caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark background. She is wearing a light green, embroidered tunic and a dark beaded necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to the neckline of her clothing. A small logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions shift slightly. She starts with a neutral expression, transitions into a smile with her mouth open, then closes her mouth while maintaining a smile, and finally returns to a neutral speaking posture. Her head movements are minimal, remaining centered throughout the clip as she addresses the camera.
